## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make tf-fmt` / `make tf-validate` pass (if Terraform changed)
- [ ] Documentation updated where needed
- [ ] Linked the related issue (if any)
